title: peucedanum polyanthum
intro: Peucedanum polyanthum, also known as Chinese angelica or Qīng Hāo, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which help to relieve pain, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Peucedanum polyanthum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Peucedanum polyanthum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water.
